title: Swizzles Fruity Pops Lollies - 50 Retro British Lollipops - Vegan Sweets Strawberry, Lemon, Orange & Blackcurrant Flavours - Individually Wrapped Lolly Pops for Parties, Gifts & Snacking
features: CHILDHOOD NOSTALGIA - These Swizzles fruity pops lollipops bring back those carefree days with every lick. Four classic flavours that'll transport you straight back to the corner shop
BULK VALUE - 50 individually wrapped lollipops bulk packed, so you're sorted for a long time of sweet cravings. No more panic buying when the sugar urge strikes unexpectedly with these lollys
PARTY READY - Skip the stress of sourcing party bag fillers. These lollipops are bulk packed into 50 ready to go treats that'll have kids (and adults) grinning from ear to ear
FLAVOUR VARIETY - Strawberry, lemon, orange, and blackcurrant lollies bulk packed for maximum taste adventure. From tangy citrus zing to sweet berry bliss in every handful
EVERYONE INCLUDED - Vegetarian and halal friendly lollies sweets bulk pack mean nobody misses out on the fun. Share the joy without worrying about dietary restrictions
